COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-06-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the PJ. for Court trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing on this day.
Dept. 218, Comm: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Beldon Yee.
C. Martin Gibson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Luxor Cab Company, Inc. Plaintiff's witnesses: David Adams and Vladislav Yakubayak, were sworn and examined. No appearance by Defendants: Joseph Courtney and Joanne Mata. Counsel will file a dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Joseph Courtney by the end of today. Matter will be set on the OSC calendar, CRC 225, for June 6, 2006.
Exhibit 1--- Estimate of damages----------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Joanne Mata as follows:
Damages: $5000.00
Interest: $1,708.33
Costs: $562.80
for a total of $7,271.13
Counsel stipulated to the return of Exhibit.
Judgment signed in open court.
